expectations.text: Recommends Layered or Modular Monolith or Microkernel as the top candidate
expectations.evidence: Recommends Microkernel (11/15, $). Also mentions Modular Monolith as solid fallback.

expectations.text: Shows a ranked table with fit scores for all 8 architecture styles
expectations.evidence: Full ranked table with all 8 styles, star ratings, fit scores, and cost.

expectations.text: Explicitly warns against or deprioritizes Microservices, Event-Driven, or Space-Based
expectations.evidence: Red Flag Check section explicitly eliminates distributed architectures. States microservices at $$$$$ is 'absurd for a 50-user internal tool'.

expectations.text: Highlights low cost as advantage given budget constraints
expectations.evidence: Explicitly notes Microkernel costs $ vs Service-Based $$ vs Microservices $$$$$.

expectations.text: Updates architecture.md with Selected Architecture Style section
expectations.evidence: architecture.md has full Selected Architecture Style section with rationale, tradeoffs, evolution path.

expectations.text: Identifies a clear winner without extensive qualifying questions
expectations.evidence: No qualifying context questions needed. Direct recommendation based on matrix scoring and red flag checks.
